name: Gomu Gomu no Mi
description:
Makes the user a Rubber Human whose body is permanently elastic: able to stretch, contort, inflate, and bounce like rubber, near-impervious to all blunt/crushing forces, and immune to electricity.
NOTE: The fruit was originally called "Hito Hito no Mi, Model: Nika" and classified as a Mythical Zoan before being renamed by the World Government.[10] Only through its awakening is the fruit's true "Sun God" Nika transformation unlocked.

name: Bara Bara no Mi
description: Makes the user a Splitting Human who can split apart their body at will, then control and levitate the separate pieces. The user also gains passive immunity to being slashed, simply separating when struck by blades or cutting forces.

name: Sube Sube no Mi
description: Makes the user's skin extremely smooth and slippery, causing attacks, objects, and even excess body fat to harmlessly slide off them due to lack of friction.

name: Bomu Bomu no Mi
description: Makes the user a Bomb Human who can detonate any part of their body (as well as bodily emissions/secretions) to unleash heat-based explosions, while also becoming immune to explosions.

name: Kiro Kiro no Mi
description: Allows the user to increase or decrease their body weight at will, from anywhere between 1 to 10,000 kilograms.

name: Hana Hana no Mi
description: Allows the user to grow duplicates of their body parts from nearby surfaces as if sprouting flowers, whether it be individual limbs or their entire body; the user maintains full control over said duplicates.

name: Doru Doru no Mi
description: Makes the user a Candle Human who can create and control candle wax.

name: Baku Baku no Mi
description: Allows the user to expand their mouth and eat anything, as well transform their body to replicate the characteristics and function of anything they have eaten in the past 24 hours.

name: Mane Mane no Mi
description: Makes the user an Imitating Human, capable of transforming into a perfect physical lookalike (sans clothing) of anyone whose face they have touched before.

name: Supa Supa no Mi
description: Makes the user a Full-Body Bladed Human who can transform any part of their body into a steel blade, thus gaining slashing abilities similar to a swordsman's and bodily toughness equal to steel.

name: Toge Toge no Mi
description: Makes the user a Spike Human who can grow long, pointy spikes from any part of their body.

name: Ori Ori no Mi
description: Allows the user to create iron bindings (cuffs, cage bars, etc.) from their body to restrain enemies.

name: Bane Bane no Mi
description: Makes the user a Spring Human who can turn parts of their body, especially their limbs, into springs that gather great force when compressed and can be used to spring-hop between surfaces.

name: Ito Ito no Mi
description: Makes the user a String Human who can create and control strings, capable of cutting through solid matter and, when attached to people's bodies, controlling them like puppets, among other things.

name: Noro Noro no Mi
description: Makes the user a "Noroma" (Slowpoke) Human who, by emitting special "Noroma" photon beams, can trap anything or anyone hit by said beams in a state of slow motion for 30 seconds.

name: Doa Doa no Mi
description: Makes the user a Door Human who can manifest doors through anything, be it walls, living beings, or the air itself.

name: Awa Awa no Mi
description: Makes the user a Soap Human who can create and control soap bubbles capable of cleaning anything, even cleaning an opponent's "strength" off their body.

name: Beri Beri no Mi
description: Makes the user a Grape Human who can split their body into a multitude of berry-like spheres.

name: Sabi Sabi no Mi
description: Makes the user a Rust Human who can rapidly rust and corrode metallic substances upon touch.

name: Shari Shari no Mi
description: Makes the user a Wheel Human who can transform their limbs into wheels.

name: Horo Horo no Mi
description: Makes the user a Ghost Human who can conjure intangible ghosts ("hollows") with explosive and despair-inducing properties, as well astrally project their own spirit.

name: Yomi Yomi no Mi
description: Makes the user a Reviving Human whose soul, after death, may return from the afterlife a single time to reanimate their body, no matter its condition. Once back alive, the user gains the power to channel various soul-based abilities, e.g. astral projection or summoning the "chill" of the underworld to freeze enemies.

name: Kage Kage no Mi
description: Makes the user a Ruler of Shadows: they can animate and freely manipulate their own shadow, as well as manifest, steal, and absorb other people's shadows to make themself bigger and stronger. Alternatively, stolen shadows can be implanted into corpses to reanimate them into zombies.

name: Suke Suke no Mi
description: Makes the user a Clear Human who can turn themself and whatever they touch (living or non-living) invisible.

name: Nikyu Nikyu no Mi
description: Makes the user a Paw Human with paw pads permanently manifested on their palms: anything touched by these paws can be "sent flying" with incredible force, from tangible objects or living people to intangible things like air, to abstract things like pain and memories, which can be pushed out of people's bodies into paw-shaped bubbles.

name: Toshi Toshi no Mi
description: Makes the user an Age Manipulation Human who can temporarily alter the age of any person (including their own) or object, either raising or lowering it. When aging themself or others into the future, the user can choose between alternate futures based on their ability to imagine what is possible.

name: Jiki Jiki no Mi
description: Allows the user to create magnetic forces and, with them, control metal.

name: Ope Ope no Mi
description:
Makes the user a Free Modification Human: by summoning a spherical force-field, the user can telekinetically control, take apart, reconstruct, and otherwise "surgically" modify anyone and anything inside that space (their "operating room") without causing direct harm.
The Ope Ope no Mi is legendary and much vaunted for its ability to confer eternal life upon someone, which is why it is reputed as the "Ultimate Devil Fruit".[11]

name: Shiro Shiro no Mi
description: Makes the user a Castle Human: their body becomes a miniature living fortress equipped with cannons and other such fortifications; anyone or anything entering their castle body is shrunk to fit inside, and whatever leaves its perimeter automatically reverts to normal size.

name: Wara Wara no Mi
description: Allows the user to create and control straw: they can house voodoo-like straw dolls inside their body to redirect all damage they receive to whoever has been linked to said dolls, as well as summon (or transform into) a giant straw monster.

name: Oto Oto no Mi
description: Allows the user to morph their body parts into musical instruments and weaponize the sound waves they create.

name: Mero Mero no Mi
description: Allows the user to turn anyone who feels attraction, lust, or simply adoration towards them into stone.

name: Doku Doku no Mi
description: Makes the user a Poison Human who can create and control poisons, while gaining poison immunity.

name: Horu Horu no Mi
description: Makes the user a Hormone-Controlling Human who, by turning their fingers into syringes, can inject themself or others with mystic hormones to affect and alter their physiology in a miscellany of ways.

name: Choki Choki no Mi
description: Makes the user a Scissors Human who can transform parts of their body into scissors; any solid substance cut by these scissors briefly behaves as if it were paper.

name: Gura Gura no Mi
description:
Makes the user a Tremor Human who can generate "quake" shockwaves (vibrations) that can travel through any medium, triggering massive earthquakes or seaquakes.
This fruit is considered the strongest Paramecia,[12] said to hold the power to destroy the world.[13]

name: Kira Kira no Mi
description: Allows the user to transform into diamond.

name: Poke Poke no Mi
description: Allows the user to create pockets on their body within which they can store objects, including ones far bigger than the pocket holes themselves, and pull these stored objects back out at will.

name: Woshu Woshu no Mi
description: Makes the user a Laundry Human who can literally "wash and hang out to dry" people and objects alike, as if they were wet clothes.

name: Fuwa Fuwa no Mi
description: Allows the user to fly and make any non-living object or substance that they have previously touched levitate, subsequently maintaining control over it akin to telekinesis.

name: Deka Deka no Mi
description: Makes the user a Gigantification Human who can drastically increase their own body size.

name: Mato Mato no Mi
description: Allows the user to "mark" a person as their target by touching them, such that any weapon thrown with that same hand will chase after the marked target as a homing projectile.

name: Fuku Fuku no Mi
description: Allows the user to summon articles of clothing.

name: Hobi Hobi no Mi
description: Allows the user to turn people and animals alike into subservient living toys, simultaneously erasing any memory of the victims from the minds of others. A secondary side-effect of the fruit is that the eater gains eternal youth.

name: Buki Buki no Mi
description: Makes the user a Full-Body Weapon Human who can transform parts of or their whole body into any kind of weapon.

name: Guru Guru no Mi
description: Makes the user a Rotation Human who can make any part of their body spin like a propeller.

name: Beta Beta no Mi
description: Makes the user a Mucus Human who can create and control extremely sticky, flammable mucus.

name: Zushi Zushi no Mi
description: Allows the user to manipulate gravity.

name: Bari Bari no Mi
description: Makes the user a Barrier Human who, by crossing their fingers, can summon indestructible barriers. These barriers can be reshaped and resized freely, but only one barrier can be maintained at a time.

name: Nui Nui no Mi
description: Allows the user to stitch together both living and non-living targets, and to un-stitch them just as easily.

name: Giro Giro no Mi
description: Makes the user an Insight Human who, by forming finger circles in front of their eyes, can see through solid objects and over vast distances, as well as read people's minds and memories.

name: Ato Ato no Mi
description: Makes the user an Art Human who can transform people and objects into abstract art, rendering them unable to function.

name: Jake Jake no Mi
description: Makes the user a Jacket Human, able to transform into a full-body jacket and take over the body of anyone wearing them, at the same time gaining access to the wearer's physical abilities.

name: Pamu Pamu no Mi
description: Makes the user a Puncture Human who can cause their body or anything inorganic they touch to inflate, rupture, and explode.

name: Sui Sui no Mi
description: Makes the user a Free-Swimming Human who can swim through solid matter, like the ground or walls, and generally interact with said solids as if they were liquid.

name: Ton Ton no Mi
description: Makes the user a Super Weight Human who can drastically increase their own body weight, by as much as thousands of metric tons.

name: Hira Hira no Mi
description: Makes the user a Flag Human who can give their own body or anything inorganic they touch the properties of fabric, making it flat, flexible, and fluttering without losing traits like hardness.

name: Ishi Ishi no Mi
description: Makes the user a Stone Assimilation Human who can merge with any stone formation and thus gain control over it.

name: Fude Fude no Mi
description: Allows the user to create and control ink using a brush as a medium, as well as physically manifest and manipulate anything they draw.

name: Nagi Nagi no Mi
description: Makes the user a Soundless Human who can mask and erase all sound.

name: Chiyu Chiyu no Mi
description: Allows the user to heal people's wounds.

name: Maki Maki no Mi
description: Allows the user to create and control scrolls that objects and substances can be sealed into, stored away to be unleashed later.

name: Soru Soru no Mi
description: Allows the user to extract souls from people who fear them, thereby stealing their lifespan. Stolen pieces of soul can be implanted into objects to bring them to life or into animals to "humanize" them, and these objects and animals (called "homies") are subservient to the user; objects animated by fragments of the user's own soul are stronger than others.

name: Mira Mira no Mi
description: Makes the user a Mirror Human who can create mirrors that reflect attacks, as well as transform living beings (themself included) into the reflection of a chosen target. The user can also turn any mirror into an entrance to the Mirro-World: an alternate space.

name: Pero Pero no Mi
description: Makes the user a Candy Human who creates and controls candy.

name: Bisu Bisu no Mi
description: Makes the user a Biscuit Human who creates and controls biscuits.

name: Bata Bata no Mi
description: Makes the user a Butter Human who creates and controls butter.

name: Buku Buku no Mi
description: Makes the user a Book Human who can telekinetically control books and trap people inside them, both in illusions and literally.

name: Kuri Kuri no Mi
description: Makes the user a Cream Human who creates and controls cream.

name: Shibo Shibo no Mi
description: Makes the user a Dehydration Human who can physically wring out and drain liquid from people and objects, as well as transfer that liquid into their own body, making them bigger and stronger.

name: Memo Memo no Mi
description: Allows the user to turn people's memories into tangible film strips and manipulate them.

name: Mochi Mochi no Mi
description:
Allows the user to create, control, and physically transform (akin to a Logia) into mochi.
The Mochi Mochi no Mi is so far the only fruit identified as a "Special" Paramecia.[5]

name: Hoya Hoya no Mi
description: Makes the user a Lamp Human who, by rubbing their belly, can summon a powerful warrior genie to fight on their behalf.

name: Netsu Netsu no Mi
description: Makes the user a High Heat Human who can emit tremendous heat from their body.

name: Kuku Kuku no Mi
description: Allows the user to transform objects into edible and nutritious (albeit bad-tasting) food.

name: Gocha Gocha no Mi
description: Allows the user to physically fuse with other people.

name: Oshi Oshi no Mi
description: Allows the user to freely move, push around, and reshape the ground as though it were malleable clay.

name: Kobu Kobu no Mi
description: Allows the user to use verbal encouragement to easily rally people into joining their cause, as well as awaken their latent fighting potential.

name: Kibi Kibi no Mi
description: Allows the user to create "dango" (millet dumplings) from their cheeks by pinching them; any animal that eats one of these dango is tamed into subservience to the user for a month.

name: Toki Toki no Mi
description: Allows the user to send themself and others forward in time.

name: Juku Juku no Mi
description: Allows the user to rapidly "mature" (age up) and decay any person or object they touch; the effect is irreversible.

name: Shiku Shiku no Mi
description: Allows the user to afflict others with diseases.

name: Wapu Wapu no Mi
description: Allows the user to "warp" (teleport) themself and others.

name: Riki Riki no Mi
description: Gives the user superhuman strength.

name: Nomi Nomi no Mi
description: Allows the user's brain to store a virtually unlimited amount of information and recall everything they ever learn, at the cost of their brain continuously expanding.

name: Shima Shima no Mi
description: Makes the user an Island Human who can merge with an island and control its environment freely.

name: Gabu Gabu no Mi
description: Makes the user a Liquor Human with unspecified abilities related to alcohol.

name: Muchi Muchi no Mi
description: Makes the user a Training Human who can force anything they whip to obey their orders, even inanimate structures.

name: Nori Nori no Mi
description: Makes the user a Driving Human who can control anything they mount and ride on.

name: Tsutsu Tsutsu no Mi
description: Makes the user a Cannon Human who can transform their body parts into cannon barrels to shoot from.

name: Iku Iku no Mi
description: Allows the user to make inanimate objects in their care grow larger, as if they were living organisms. Its current ability user Biblo, who is an owl, thus became a Nurturing Owl.

name: Aro Aro no Mi
description: Makes the user an Arrow Human who can create and control vector arrows that exert influence on motion itself.

name: Iba Iba no Mi
description: Makes the user a Thorn Human who can create and control thorny vines, as well as individual thorns.

name: Hiso Hiso no Mi
description: Allows the user to communicate with animals.

name: Kama Kama no Mi
description: Gives the user long, sharp fingernails that can be used to send out slashing wind (kamakaze).

name: Atsu Atsu no Mi
description: Makes the user a 10,000 Degree Human who can create immense heat from their body and control it, up to a maximum temperature of 10,000 degrees.

name: Ami Ami no Mi
description: Allows the user to create nets from their body or turn their body itself into nets, as well have their nets adopt the properties of whatever material they ingest.

name: Peto Peto no Mi
description: Allows the user to create collars that, if put on any living creature whether human or animal, forces that creature to obey the user's commands like a pet.

name: Koro Koro no Mi
description: Allows the user to turn into a human rail cart.

name: Moa Moa no Mi
description: Allows the user to multiply the size and speed of any object they touch by up to a factor of 100.

name: Kyubu Kyubu no Mi
description: Makes the user a Cube Human who can cubify, as well as split into smaller cubes, anything they touch, even something intangible like air.

name: Jara Jara no Mi
description: Makes the user a Chain Human who creates and controls metal chains.

name: Iro Iro no Mi
description: Makes the user a Camouflage Human who can create paint to camouflage and disguise people or objects.

name: Goe Goe no Mi
description: Allows the user to release powerful sound waves by screaming, which resemble giant energy beams.

name: Kachi Kachi no Mi
description: Allows the user to simultaneously harden and heat up their body.

name: Noko Noko no Mi
description: Makes the user a Poison Spore Human who can create and control toxic mushroom spores.

name: Modo Modo no Mi
description: Makes the user a "Return Return" Human who can make anything or anyone they touch 12 years younger; used enough times, the power can make a target vanish from existence.

name: Mosa Mosa no Mi
description: Allows the user to amplify the growth of plants.

name: Nuke Nuke no Mi
description: Allows the user to phase through solid objects.

name: Goru Goru no Mi
description: Allows the user to telekinetically manipulate gold.

name: Raki Raki no Mi
description: Allows the user to steal the luck of anyone they touch.

name: Bijo Bijo no Mi
description: Allows the user to create illusory, phantom-like projections of any picture they have touched.

name: Gasha Gasha no Mi
description: Makes the user an Assimilation Human who can telekinetically disassemble inanimate objects and then reassemble them into new shapes/structures, including mechanical contraptions.

name: Uta Uta no Mi
description: Allows the user to transport their own and others' consciousness into a virtual space, which they have complete control over, by singing.

name: Dero Dero no Mi
description: Makes the user a Dissolving Human who can dissolve anything into a liquid, including themself.

name: Kopi Kopi no Mi
description: Allows the user to copy the abilities of another Devil Fruit user.

name: Kone Kone no Mi
description: Allows the user to transform someone to look like someone else.

name: Maji Maji no Mi
description: Makes the user a Magic Human who can use techniques resembling a stage or palor magician's, like hypnotism, invisibility, and illusions.

name: Nito Nito no Mi
description: Makes the user a Nitroglycerin Human who can use the explosive abilities of nitroglycerin.

name: Hore Hore no Mi
description: Makes the user an Aphrodisiac Human who can force people to fall in love with them by projecting special light rays.

name: Nepa Nepa no Mi
description: Makes the user a Heat Wave Human who can generate heat waves.

name: Mono Mono no Mi
description: Makes the user a Recreation Human who can create clones of people and objects.

name: Ute Ute no Mi
description: Makes the user a Firing Human who can transform their hands into guns, as well as sprout gun barrels on any nearby surface.

name: Pocha Pocha no Mi
description: Makes the user a Flab Human who can add extra fat onto an opponent's body.

name: Bana Bana no Mi
description: Allows the user to harness jealousy and convert it into heat and fire.

name: Deri Deri no Mi
description: Makes the user a Delivery Human who can deliver anything they want to any point they can see.

name: Basu Basu no Mi
description: Makes the user a Bomb Transformation Human who can turn anything they touch into a bomb.

name: Nibi Nibi no Mi
description: Makes the user an Onibi Human who can reproduce the appearance of the deceased.

name: Nori Nori no Mi
description: Makes the user a Dance Human who can force people to dance.

name: Chuni Chuni no Mi
description: Makes the user a Tuning Human who can "tune" (increase or decrease) the strength of others' abilities.

name: Mari Mari no Mi
description: Makes the user a Marionette Human who can create copies of people under their total control.

name: Shuku Shuku no Mi
description: Makes the user a Compression Human who can compress objects.

name: Homi Homi no Mi
description: Makes the user a Homing Human who can make objects they hold fly to a predefined location.

name: Mabo Mabo no Mi
description: Makes the user a Phantom Human who can create illusions based on people's memories.

name: Kado Kado no Mi
description: Grants unknown but likely card-related abilities.

name: Riba Riba no Mi
description: Makes the user a Reverse Human who can reverse the flow of time around them.

name: Nemu Nemu no Mi
description: Allows the user to induce sleepiness in others, steal their sleeping victims' memories, and use them to become bigger and stronger.

name: Kote Kote no Mi
description: Allows the user to create a pair of giant gauntlets that can be used to punch or grab, and the user can control any non-living thing in their grasp.

name: Mini Mini no Mi
description: Allows the user to shrink themself down to 5 mm in height without reducing their strength. They can also return to their full size at will, as well as change to any size in-between.

name: Gutsu Gutsu no Mi
description: Makes the user a Blast Furnace Human who can consume metal ores, melt them down within their body, solidify them, and then shape them into anything they want, usually metal weapons.

name: Peke Peke no Mi
description: Allows the user to transform other people into clones of Peketan.

name: Gemu Gemu no Mi
description: Allows the user to transport other people into a game-like world, the game genre of which they decide.

name: Kyara Kyara no Mi
description: Provides consciousness to non-living souls, as well as allowing the soul to merge with others.
